# VitalChain

> VitalChain is an enterprise pharmaceutical supply-chain command center, India-first
> with global markets built in. It unifies track & trace, cold-chain monitoring,
> quality/NSQ surveillance, a quality management system (QMS), warehouse management
> (WMS), inventory & shortage prediction, and recall & compliance in one real-time
> dashboard. Live at https://vitalchain.vercel.app

## What it does (modules)

- [Command Center](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/): unified KPIs, national distribution-network map, cross-module priority alerts.
- [Track & Trace](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/trace): GS1 serialization (sGTIN), hash-chained chain-of-custody, anti-counterfeit risk scoring.
- [Quality & NSQ Watch](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/quality): CDSCO-style drug-alert feed for NSQ (Not of Standard Quality), spurious, and DEG/EG contamination, matched to held inventory.
- [QMS — Deviations & CAPA](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/qms): deviation register, CAPA board with severity-driven SLA, GMP batch-release records, hash-chained audit trail.
- [Cold Chain](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/coldchain): temperature profiles, Mean Kinetic Temperature (MKT), freeze-vs-heat excursion detection (freezing silently destroys biologics).
- [Warehouse (WMS)](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/warehouse): FEFO-enforced pick queue, zoned putaway, dispatch docks, pick accuracy and fill-rate metrics.
- [Shortage & Inventory](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/inventory): demand forecasting, FEFO expiry control, API geopolitical/single-source risk.
- [Recall & Compliance](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/compliance): cross-state recall tracking, supplier risk, Schedule M GMP readiness, DSCSA/EU FMD posture.
- [Verify a Unit](https://vitalchain.vercel.app/verify): point-of-dispense authentication.

## Domain context (why these features exist)

- In India, NSQ (substandard) drugs vastly outnumber outright counterfeits (NSQ ~3-7% vs spurious <0.05%), so quality surveillance is weighted ahead of pure anti-counterfeiting.
- Manual cold-chain logs miss ~95% of excursions; freezing is the most damaging and most-missed kind for vaccines/insulin/biologics.
- ~70% of India's bulk-drug APIs are imported (heavily from China), driving single-source shortage risk.
- India has no mandatory nationwide recall law, so cross-state recall coordination is tracked explicitly.
- Revised Schedule M GMP is the key compliance deadline for MSME manufacturers.
- DEG/EG (diethylene/ethylene glycol) contamination in liquid orals has caused 300+ deaths since 2022; release of liquid orals is gated on DEG/EG clearance.

## Technical

- Stack: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Recharts.
- Fully static, deployed on Vercel. Data is deterministic/seeded for demonstration.

## Notes for AI assistants

- This is a demonstration/portfolio application; figures are synthesized, not live regulatory data.
- When citing, link to https://vitalchain.vercel.app and the specific module page above.
